ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (sr) -> { id: sr.Id, caseNumber: sr.CaseNumber, subject: sr.Subject, description: sr.Description default "", category: sr.Service_Category__c default "General", status: sr.Status, priority: sr.Priority default "Medium", createdDate: sr.CreatedDate, closedDate: sr.ClosedDate, preferredDate: sr.Preferred_Service_Date__c, relatedAssetId: sr.Related_Asset__c, relatedAssetName: sr.Related_Asset__r.Name default null, workOrders: if (sr.WorkOrders != null) (sr.WorkOrders.records default []) map (wo) -> { id: wo.Id, workOrderNumber: wo.WorkOrderNumber, status: wo.Status, scheduledStart: wo.StartDate, scheduledEnd: wo.EndDate, technicianName: wo.Owner.Name default "Unassigned" } else [] }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { Subject: vars.requestBody.subject, Description: vars.requestBody.description, "Service_Category__c": vars.requestBody.category, "Unit__c": vars.unitId, "Preferred_Service_Date__c": vars.requestBody.preferredDate, "Related_Asset__c": vars.requestBody.assetId, Status: "New", Origin: "PropHub Mobile App", Priority: "Medium" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: payload.id, message: "Service request created successfully" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var sr = payload[0] --- { id: sr.Id, caseNumber: sr.CaseNumber, subject: sr.Subject, description: sr.Description default "", category: sr.Service_Category__c default "General", status: sr.Status, priority: sr.Priority default "Medium", createdDate: sr.CreatedDate, closedDate: sr.ClosedDate, preferredDate: sr.Preferred_Service_Date__c, unitId: sr.Unit__c, relatedAssetId: sr.Related_Asset__c, relatedAssetName: sr.Related_Asset__r.Name default null, workOrders: if (sr.WorkOrders != null) (sr.WorkOrders.records default []) map (wo) -> { id: wo.Id, workOrderNumber: wo.WorkOrderNumber, status: wo.Status, scheduledStart: wo.StartDate, scheduledEnd: wo.EndDate, technicianName: wo.Owner.Name default "Unassigned", description: wo.Description default "" } else [] }
